source: GA4 property 250338585 (last 7d: 2026-07-17..07-23, landingPage + sessionManualAdContent split) + Shopify live pull (net_sales EUR + orders, last 90d, by billing_country). Significance/verdict block carried from last Monday (2026-07-13); recomputed Mondays only.
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Refreshed daily by Polly (data); pause/promote verdicts on Mondays. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra fields (aggregate_7d, real_sales_90d, built_not_yet_live) preserved for future UI surfaces.
polly_note: DATA-ONLY REFRESH (Friday 2026-07-24). No pause/promote verdicts today - decision review: Mondays. EN A/B now DEAD EVEN: by page A 0.85% (15 txn / 1761 sess) vs B 0.85% (15 txn / 1775 sess); by ad-content lp_a 0.79% (14 txn / 1767 sess) vs lp_b 0.79% (15 txn / 1889 sess). No separation - definitely no verdict. EN BOUNCE STILL IN TRANSITION (~30% blended): the 7d window 07-17..23 mixes PRE-dedupe days (07-17..20, artifact-low ~5-8%) and POST-dedupe days (07-21..23, true ~78%). The double-page_view artifact was removed by my 07-21 dedupe (commit b175123) - so bounce is normalizing UPWARD as the low-artifact days age out; it will settle at the true rate once the window is fully post-07-21 (by Monday). Do NOT read the wk/wk bounce move as a behavior change. LOCALIZED RECOVERY CONTINUES + FIRST REVENUE: lying-pirates-it 155->248 sess wk/wk AND its first 3 LP-attributed transactions (1.21% conv); lying-pirates-de 40->63; retired big-box-*-<lang> decaying. Shopify 90d stable & growing: US/UK/IT top 3 (IT 154 orders / EUR11,162, 3rd-largest, still climbing); AU now edges DE on revenue.

experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).

experiments.polly_note: DATA-ONLY (Fri). Dead even this week: by page A 0.85% (15 txn / 1761 sess) vs B 0.85% (15 txn / 1775 sess); by ad-content both 0.79%. No separation, cumulative conv still short of the ~100-per-variant threshold - no verdict today, significance recomputed Mondays. Bounce (~30%) is mid-transition after the 07-21 double-page_view dedupe - ignore the wk/wk bounce swing, it's a tracking correction not behavior. Standing recommendation holds: ship shared improvements to A & B and launch V3 as a genuinely different challenger.
